label: Phase 1: Core API & Data Layer
body:
This phase establishes the foundational backend infrastructure for TaskFlow. The primary focus is implementing user authentication via Auth0 JWT integration, building the core task CRUD endpoints with Zod validation, and setting up the PostgreSQL data layer with proper schema design and migrations. Shared TypeScript types will be published to ensure frontend-backend contract alignment.

The implementation follows a bottom-up approach: database schema first, then the data access layer, authentication middleware, and finally the REST endpoints. Integration tests will validate the complete request lifecycle against a real database.

phaseContext.summary: Implement the foundational backend API including authentication, task CRUD operations, and the PostgreSQL data layer.

included: User authentication with JWT via Auth0
Task CRUD endpoints with Zod validation
Shared TypeScript types for API contracts

affectedProjects.purpose: Primary implementation target for auth and task endpoints
expectedChanges: New auth middleware with JWT validation

affectedProjects.purpose: Define TypeScript contracts consumed by frontend

tasks.title: Design PostgreSQL schema
tasks.description: Create database schema for users, tasks, boards, and columns with proper indexes and constraints.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Migration files that create the core tables with referential integrity

tasks.title: Implement database access layer
tasks.description: Create repository pattern abstractions over the PostgreSQL schema using Kysely query builder.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Type-safe repository classes for User, Task, Board, Column entities

tasks.title: Implement JWT auth middleware
tasks.description: Create Express middleware that validates JWT tokens from Auth0, extracts user claims, and attaches them to the request context.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Auth middleware that returns 401 for invalid tokens and populates req.user

tasks.title: Create auth routes
tasks.description: Implement login callback, token refresh, and logout endpoints.

tasks.title: Define shared API types
tasks.description: Create TypeScript interfaces for task-related API request and response payloads in the shared-types package.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Exported types: CreateTaskRequest, UpdateTaskRequest, TaskResponse, TaskListResponse

tasks.title: Implement task CRUD endpoints
tasks.description: Build REST endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting tasks with Zod input validation.
tasks.expectedOutcome: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/tasks with proper auth, validation, and error handling

tasks.title: Add integration tests for task endpoints
tasks.description: Write integration tests that hit the actual API with a test database.
tasks.expectedOutcome: Test suite covering happy paths, validation errors, auth failures, and edge cases

apis.name: Task REST API
apis.description: RESTful CRUD endpoints for task management at /api/tasks

apis.name: Auth API
apis.description: Authentication endpoints at /auth/* for login callback, refresh, and logout

boundaries: web-app must only access backend-api through the REST API
shared-types is the single source of truth for API payload shapes

dataContracts.name: TaskResponse
dataContracts.description: Canonical shape for task data returned by all GET endpoints

newModels.name: User
newModels.description: Application user linked to Auth0 identity

risksAndEdgeCases.description: Auth0 token validation latency may impact API response times under load
risksAndEdgeCases.mitigation: Cache JWKS keys locally with 1-hour TTL

risksAndEdgeCases.description: Database migration ordering is critical — tasks table depends on users and boards
Concurrent task updates may cause lost-update anomalies
risksAndEdgeCases.mitigation: Use optimistic locking with version column on tasks table

verificationSteps: All migration scripts run cleanly on empty database
Auth middleware correctly validates and rejects tokens
CRUD endpoints return correct HTTP status codes
Shared types compile and are importable from web-app
testExpectations: Integration tests for all CRUD endpoints with real database
Unit tests for auth middleware with mock tokens
qaGateCriteria: 100% of endpoints documented with request/response examples
No N+1 query patterns in task listing
All error responses follow consistent error format

definitionOfDone: Database migrations run successfully on clean database
Auth endpoints return proper JWT tokens
Task CRUD endpoints pass integration tests
Shared types package builds and exports correctly
API response times under 200ms for P95 with test load
No TypeScript compilation errors across affected projects
